app.title: SkylarkAI
app.subtitle: Backend-led operations intelligence shell
app.sessionCheckingHint: Booting the Sign In → Sign Out shell before backend transport wiring.
app.mockBanner: This UI scaffold currently runs on local mocked auth and chat data. Backend wiring comes after the shell is finalized.
signIn.title: Sign in to SkylarkAI
signIn.subtitle: Responsive sign-in and assistant workspace shell, built before live backend transport.
signIn.helper: For this mocked UI tranche, any valid email and password with at least 6 characters will work.
signIn.panelBody: A Phoenix-inspired visual layer wrapped around the SkylarkAI assistant-ui shell, with mobile-friendly spacing and localized UI states.
signIn.featureOne: Glass surfaces, muted gradients, and quieter shell chrome
signIn.featureTwo: assistant-ui remains the live thread and composer layer
signIn.featureThree: Flat locale support for English, Japanese, Chinese, and Korean
signIn.securityHint: Enter the local demo verification code shown on the right to continue.
signIn.securityInvalid: Enter the correct 3-digit verification code to continue.
signIn.demoHint: This is a truthful local demo verification step for the current mocked sign-in flow.
signIn.errorInvalid: Please use a valid email and a password of at least 6 characters.
signIn.errorGeneric: Sign in failed. Please try again.
sidebar.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.
chat.emptyBody: Use the composer below to begin a new thread, or reopen a pinned/recent conversation from the sidebar.
chat.suggestionOne: Summarize current operational risk signals for this mock workspace
chat.suggestionTwo: Show a polished assistant response state with bullets and emphasis
chat.suggestionThree: Simulate an ambiguity prompt that asks a clarifying follow-up
composer.placeholder: Ask a question, explore a mock result state, or simulate an ambiguity prompt…
